title: Kobolds
description: This mod adds tiny lizard people!~
body:
#### <sub>This mod adds in an underground civilization of kobolds which can be traded with and they defend their dens from the common threats of the Overworld!</sub>

![One](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ufaxN0Ay/images/4a435d7afaaa0008e04e9f79a896a5f4f4e35191.png)

## **<center>~Features~</center>**

* Friendly Kobolds that can be traded with!
* Kobolds enjoys consuming Amethyst Shards!
* Kobold defends their homes from hostiles.
* Peaceful Kobold Enchanters that offers potions and Prospector, a new enchantment!
* Kobold Den structures that spawns under Forests.
* Zombolds from when Kobolds die to any Zombie & be cured just like Zombie Villagers!

![Two](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ufaxN0Ay/images/69b112394b7c43382ce6a60fa17a2818bcc0fb1b.png)
